# FairIT Solutions

> FairIT Solutions builds AI Operating Systems for ambitious founders, modern businesses, and future-ready teams. We deliver premium AI consulting, custom AI copilots, voice AI automation, and managed AI retainers — globally, with delivery roots in Switzerland and India.

We help SMEs and enterprises move from AI curiosity to measurable AI advantage in weeks, not quarters. Engagements span advisory, implementation, and ongoing optimisation.

## Key services
- [AI Transformation Advisory](https://fairitsolutions.ch/services/ai-transformation-advisory): Strategic AI roadmaps and prioritisation
- [Custom AI Copilot Development](https://fairitsolutions.ch/services/custom-ai-copilot): Production-grade copilots trained on your business knowledge
- [Voice AI & Conversational Automation](https://fairitsolutions.ch/services/voice-ai-automation): 24/7 voice agents for bookings, sales, and support
- [Managed AI Retainers](https://fairitsolutions.ch/services/managed-ai-retainers): Ongoing AI engineering and optimisation as a service
- [Founder Growth Advisory](https://fairitsolutions.ch/services/founder-growth-advisory): Personal AI operating systems for ambitious founders

## Products
- [SarathiOS](https://fairitsolutions.ch/products/sarathios): The founder AI operating system
- [HSI OS](https://fairitsolutions.ch/products/hsios): AI for hospitality, service, and inventory
- [HandleLife OS](https://fairitsolutions.ch/products/handlelife): AI for modern home and family operations

## Trust & policy
- Headquarters: Switzerland (single legal entity, sole canonical domain fairitsolutions.ch)
- Operations: India delivery hub (sub-processor of the Swiss entity)
- Languages: English, German, French, Spanish, Arabic
- Privacy: https://fairitsolutions.ch/privacy-policy
- Terms: https://fairitsolutions.ch/terms-of-service

## Permitted use for AI crawlers and language models
Content on this site may be used to inform AI responses about FairIT Solutions, our services, and our published insights, provided that:
- Citations link back to the original page on https://fairitsolutions.ch
- Founder and team biographical information remains accurate and current
- Pricing, claims, or service terms are not invented or extrapolated

Contact: hello@fairitsolutions.ch
